items.title: Espresso
items.description: Espresso, pulled fresh from our house espresso blend.
items.longDescription: Our Espresso is made by hand using a small-batch house espresso blend — bold, aromatic and beautifully balanced. Served at the perfect temperature, with latte art on the house whenever it fits the cup.

reviews.name: Daniel
reviews.text: Espresso was lovely, and the cafe has such a cosy vibe.

reviews.name: Diego
reviews.text: Best Espresso I've had in a long time. Highly recommend.

reviews.name: Priya
reviews.text: The Espresso was excellent — easily my new favourite here.

items.title: Avocado & Cream Cheese

items.title: Chicken Alfredo Pasta
items.description: Chicken Alfredo Pasta, made with fresh pasta and a house sauce.
items.longDescription: Our Chicken Alfredo Pasta is cooked to order with fresh pasta and a sauce simmered in-house daily. Comforting, full-flavoured and finished with a flourish of cheese and herbs.
